title: LGs Player Corpses
description: This lightweight pack adds player corpses on death!
body:
# PLAYER CORPSES
This lightweight datapack adds player corpses on players' death!

Corpses can have two positions, one where the corpse is laying face-down, and one laying face-up, their rotation is also randomized so they may look as if you've broken your neck

Corpses decay overtime (250 seconds with corpse being loaded)

# CONFIGURATION
**/scoreboard players set %DEFAULT player_death_body.remove _(number)_** configures the time for the corpse to decay

Set to **50** by default

The time is **x*5** seconds (x is the scoreboard value)

# PERFORMANCE
The pack doesn't tick, only decreases the timer by 1 each 5 seconds so the pack is very much a lightweight one so it barely affects the performance
